advice.title: You broke the build often
advice.body: You broke the build on 3/7 checkpoints (42%). Frequent breakage masks the source of new failures and forces you to debug stale code alongside new code.

advice.title: Tests regressed mid-session
advice.body: Tests went from passing to failing 1 time. Each regression is a fresh debug task — and the longer one sits, the harder it gets to pin to the change that caused it.
